scripts.bundle:check: pnpm --filter @aiui/runtime-core run bundle:check && pnpm --filter @aiui/runtime-react run bundle:check
scripts.test: pnpm run check:repo && pnpm --filter @aiui/dsl-schema test && pnpm --filter @aiui/expression test && pnpm --filter @aiui/logic test && pnpm --filter @aiui/runtime-core test
